evals.name: single-experiment-rich

assertions.text: mix of question types from catalog
assertions.evidence: 6 distinct types: multiple_choice, numerical_estimate, ranking, anomaly_hunt, equation_or_baseline, free_text_intuition

assertions.text: every question has explanation citing a concrete artifact
assertions.evidence: every explanation cites a named section (Model Comparison table, Anomalies, Suggested Next Steps, etc.)

assertions.text: HTML self-contained: only external refs are MathJax + polyfill CDNs
assertions.evidence: polyfill.io and cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/mathjax@3 are the only external script srcs

evals.notes: All assertions passed. 5 SKILL.md defects identified by the validator (see iteration-1/feedback.md). Fixes applied to SKILL.md, question_catalog.md, generation.md before closing iteration 1.
